assistant
The Allen Institute for AI (Ai2) is a non-profit research institute dedicated to conducting high-impact AI research and engineering for the common good. Based in Seattle, Ai2 aims to develop AI systems that are trustworthy, transparent, and accessible to everyone. The homepage highlights their mission to advance AI research in areas such as natural language processing, computer vision, and ethical AI, with projects like the AllenNLP framework and the Common Sense AI initiative. They emphasize collaboration, open science, and making their research and tools freely available to the public. Ai2 is supported by Paul Allen’s legacy and works with a diverse team of researchers, engineers, and partners to push the boundaries of AI while ensuring it benefits society as a whole.
